name: capital_deployment_aggressive
description: Account-aware capital deployment config. Read by shared/allocator.py POST-learning-loop. Drives daily target allocation toward 100% invested capital with regime-aware fallbacks. NEVER hardcode these values in monitor code.

capital_deployment._comment_auto_execute: 2026-05-14: FLIPPED TO TRUE. System is fully autonomous now — allocator both generates the daily plan AND fires the orders via Alpaca REST. Deterministic risk gates (risk_officer + portfolio_risk + intraday_governor + instrument_windows + buying_power) still apply per order; failures are logged + skipped, not surfaced as approval requests. Paper-only invariant enforced upstream in shared/autonomy.py::assert_paper_only.

fallback_allocations._comment: Used when ranked momentum candidates < target_invested_ratio. Picked in order from list, sized equally up to max_single_position cap.

sizing_rules._comment_sizing: Primary picks (score >= min_score_for_entry from aggressive_profile) get ~18% each, max 5 = 90% target. Remaining ~8-10% from fallback at 10% each. min_diff_pct_to_rebalance = skip orders smaller than 2% of equity (cash drag preferable to micro-trades).

risk_overrides._comment_risk: Full deployment NEVER overrides hard risk limits. Plan output shows skipped tickers with rationale.
